summary: Tested SCI Lease Calculation Refactoring for CalcAuto AiPro. All 9 backend tests passed. The refactored SCI annuity-in-advance formula is working correctly. Key verification: Ram 1500 Tradesman at 71580$, 42m, 1.49%, 12k km = 758.81$ before tax, 872.44$ total (exact match with expected values). Frontend UI confirmed: Option 1 and Option 2 columns are visible when program has option2_rates, Location SCI section works with km and term selection, MEILLEUR CHOIX calculation functions correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/sci/calculate-lease correctly implements SCI annuity-in-advance formula: PMT_arrears = (NCC*mr*factor - RV*mr)/(factor-1), PMT_advance = PMT_arrears/(1+mr)
Frontend leaseCalculator.ts computeLeasePayment() matches backend formula exactly
0% rate edge case handled correctly (returns simple depreciation / term)
credit_taxe_echange correctly calculated as min(trade_value/term * TAUX_TAXE, taxes_mensuelles)
Negative solde_reporte correctly increases net_cap_cost by abs(solde) * 1.14975
context_for_next_testing_agent: SCI Lease Calculation refactoring fully tested and working. Backend endpoint /api/sci/calculate-lease uses exact SCI annuity-in-advance formula. Frontend leaseCalculator.ts exports computeLeasePayment(), computePMTAdvance(), computeNetCapCost() functions that match backend. Verified: Ram 1500 at 71580$, 42m, 1.49%, 12k km produces monthly_before_tax=758.81, monthly_payment=872.44 (exact match). Trade-in with trade_value=15000 produces credit_taxe_echange=53.48. Option 1 vs Option 2 financing columns display when program has option2_rates.

POST /api/sci/calculate-lease.test_case: Ram 1500 Tradesman: msrp=71580, term=42, rate=1.49%, residual=57%, km=12k, frais_dossier=259.95

frontend_ui.option1_option2_columns: PASSED - Both Option 1 and Option 2 columns visible when program has option2_rates
frontend_ui.location_sci_section: PASSED - PDSF/PDOC, Solde reporté, Kilométrage/an, Terme location all visible
frontend_ui.meilleur_choix_banner: PASSED - Shows best lease option with savings amount

calculation_logic.annuity_in_advance_formula: PMT_arrears = (NCC * mr * factor - RV * mr) / (factor - 1), PMT_advance = PMT_arrears / (1 + mr)
calculation_logic.taxes_qc: TPS: 5%, TVQ: 9.975% applied ON the payment

test_cases_executed: Frontend: Select Ram 1500 Tradesman, Express, Warlock - PASSED
Frontend: Option 1 and Option 2 columns visible in rates table - PASSED
Frontend: Location SCI section enabled and km/term selection works - PASSED
API: Direct curl test for 42 mois calculation verified exact values
